creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, thanks. One small modification, the target cannot be completely empty, so I put the post-install: line instead the .if block.

In the future, can you please submit patches that will apply to the actual port? When your orig/dest are both named "Makefile.orig" then I have to manually edit the patch to apply it.

How did you create that patch anyway?
